creator: linpct@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for your help!

I'd like to provide new patch for graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool and graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel, because the patch you provided still had something missed.

The attachments(p5-Image-ExifTool.patch, p5-Image-ExifTool-devel.patch) provide  update to 9.60 and 9.67.

Thanks.
